case_title: THE SCHMIDT-PRESCOTT GROUP, INC. VS. DAVID YANG

docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE SCHMIDT-PRESCOTT GROUP, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT YANG, DAVID ( ATTORNEY AT LAW )

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT YANG, DAVID ( ATTORNEY AT LAW ) RECOVER FROM CROSS DEFENDANT THE SCHMIDT-PRESCOTT GROUP, INC. $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $65.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,065.00, PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM IS DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE.--NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

THE MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT OF JUL-23-2014 IS OFF CALENDAR - JUDGMENT SATISFIED. ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT FILED BY CROSS--COMPLAINANT ON 7/23/14 IN ROOM 103. APPEARANCE BY CROSS--COMPLAINANT, ONLY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. APPEARANCE BY CROSS--COMPLAINANT, ONLY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-13-2014 - JUDGMENT.
